breathTypes.name: Acid Breath
breathTypes.raw: Dieamarjla using the Acid Breath ability Effect: Deals damage two times per second, with a damage multiplier of x0.5 per hit. This breath has a Capacity of 10, a Regen Rate of 1.8, a Range of 180 studs, and a Critical chance of 10%. It can also inflict Corrosion Status (Probability = 100%, STACKS = 0.5). Acid Breath Creatures : Click to toggle. Dieamarjla Jetebene Malupiscis Nok'Tuun Noxiouk Venatrox Zeoarex

breathTypes.name: Cloud Breath
breathTypes.raw: Wixpectr'o using its Cloud Breath ability Effect: Deals no damage. This breath has a Capacity of 10, a Regen Rate of 1.3, and a Range of 250 studs. It provides SelfHeal at 1% Max health regen per sec and Stamina Regen at 1% Max stamina regen per sec. It can also self-apply Water Regeneration (Probability = 99%, STACKS = 2), and Muddy (Probability = 40%, STACKS = 2). Cloud Breath Creatures : Click to toggle. Flickaflie Fuejin'Liya Galtekron Geortharoc Gramoss Gryvila Halaqual Leurimess Novus Warden Taiyuelong Wixpectr'o Wystora Yenyasha

It can also inflict the following ailments: Bleed Status (Probability = 75%, STACKS = 0.5), Injury (Probability = 50%, STACKS = 1), and Shredded Wings (Probability = 50%, STACKS = 1). Crystal Breath Creatures : Click to toggle. Geoptxina Lucensia Muravil Pliarys Viridex Zethines

breathTypes.name: Solar Beam
breathTypes.raw: Ouratum using its Solar Beam ability Effect: Deals damage two times per second, with a damage multiplier of x1.5 per hit. This ability has a Capacity of 10, a Regen Rate of 0, a Range of 550 studs, and a Critical chance of 0%. Unlike other breaths, once activated, Solar Beam will not stop firing until empty. breathTypes.name: Heliolyth's Judgement
breathTypes.raw: Turrim using its Heliolyth's Judgement ability Effect: Deals true damage two times per second, equal to 1.6% of the target's max HP per hit. This ability ignores Breath Resistance and weight scaling. This ability has a Capacity of 10, a Regen Rate of 0, a Range of 550 studs, and a Critical chance of 0%. Once activated, Heliolyth's Judgement will not stop firing until empty. This ability has a Time Before Fire of 3 seconds and has a Cooldown of 120 seconds, instead of a Regen Rate.

effect.perHit: 1.6% MAX HP TRUE DAMAGE PER HIT
